series_metadata.series_title: Comprehensive Statewide Homeland Security Plan and Progress Updates
series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the Comprehensive Statewide Homeland Security Strategic Plan, reference and supporting documents, and progress updates and ratings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office files current, plus ten (10) years. ; Electronic: Retain on Ohio Homeland Security network drive current, plus ten (10) years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
